description:
Transform your space with a vibrant custom poster that adds personality and charm to any room. Whether you're decorating for a party or upgrading your everyday space, this high-quality print makes it easy to create a look you love.

Printed on premium resin-coated photo paper, each poster delivers rich colors, sharp details, and a beautiful satin finish for a professional look—no frame needed.

Perfect for bedrooms, living rooms, bathrooms, kids' rooms, offices, dorms, and more.

✨ Product Features:
🖼️ Premium resin-coated photo paper for durability & vivid colors
🎨 Satin finish for enhanced depth and clarity
💪 Heavyweight 230 gsm (9 mil thickness)
🌈 High color gamut & sharp image resolution
⏳ Long-lasting: up to 95 years indoors, 5 years in sunlight
📦 Rolled and shipped in a protective tube

📏 Sizes: 8"x12" | 11"x17" | 12"x18" | 16"x16" | 16"x24" | 18"x24" | 24"x24" | 24"x36" | 30"x30" | 32"x48"
⚠️ Frame not included
